summary: Scripts self-clean on fire (unload plist + rm both files) to avoid stale LaunchAgents accumulating over time.
context: Rewrote notify-me skill Workflow 2 to use launchd instead of `at`/`sleep`. Added Workflow 3 (list pending notifications) and Workflow 4 (cancel a notification). Bumped plugin version 1.0.29 → 1.0.30.
rationale: Scripts self-clean on fire (unload plist + rm both files) to avoid stale LaunchAgents accumulating over time.
